message:
feat(microsoft365): add Planner, SharePoint, and Excel Online modules

- planner.rs: Tasks CRUD, checklist/comments, policy-gated writes (164 tests)
- sharepoint.rs: Sites/drives/lists, search, sharing links with policy enforcement (139 tests)
- excel.rs: Range read/write, table append, RangeAddress parsing (155 tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
